item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 12s Which rising receiver would be a fit for the Steelers? Who could help the 49ers solve
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 12s Which rising receiver would be a fit for the Steelers? Who could help the 49ers solve their pass-rushing woes? @Eric_Edholm provides five takeaways from NFL Network draft analyst Daniel Jeremiah's conference call.
